titleStmt.title: SII 25.254: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 254. (A.R. No. 254 of 1908.) KURUSPĀL, BASTAR STATE, CENTRAL PROVINCES.

summary.p: Slab built upside down in one of the steps of a tank called Rānī Tarai.
This record is undated but on palaeographical considerations it may be assigned to c. 11th century. The cyclic year Saumya mentioned here falls in Śaka 991 which corresponds to 1069 A.D.
The king Rājabhūshaṇa Sōmēśvaradēva is stated to have been born of the Nāga race and bears all the epithets attributed to his name as in the Nārāyanpāl inscription.

This slab is apparently dedicated to the god Kāmēśvara (Śiva) referred to in the inscription. It records the grant of land near Kalamba by queens Sōmala-mahādēvī and Dhāraṇa-mahādēvī. The land at Kalamba was given to Kāmēśvara free of taxes and all encumbrances. Before it was endowed to the god, it was made a dēvadāya (by) Paṁḍitā Taṭṭākatala-Mahaṇaka. It mentions certain tenants, who are the residents of Nārāyaṇapura and Ṭēmarā, as the witnesses.
It was caused to be engraved by D.mōdara Sūtradhāri. The verse was composed by Tikama.
It is worthy of note that the queen Dhāraṇa-Mahādēvī and the names of the recipients mentioned here also figure in the Nārāyanpāl record of Guṇḍa-Mahādēvi. (See, Ep. Ind., Vol. IX, pp. 314-15).
Dhāraṇamahādēvī is no doubt mentioned as the queen (rāṇī) of Sōmēśvaradēva in a fragmentary record from Kuruspāl (Ep. Ind., Vol. X, p. 34; A.R.Ep., 1908, No. 260)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Oṁ svasti . sahasra phaṇamaṇi kirīṇa nikarāva bhāśva
ra nāgavaṁśodbhava bhogāvatipuravaresvara savatsa
vyāghralāṁchana kāsyapagotra prakaṭita vijaya
ghoṣaḥ viśva viśvaṁbhareśvara parama māheśvara pipara
ma tabhaṭṭārakaḥ mahāmaheśvara ciraṇa kaṁja kiṁjalka
puṁjapiṁjaritta bhramarāyamānaḥ śrīmadrājabhūṣaṇa
mahārājādhirāja śrī someśvaradevapādānukalyāma vija
yarājye saṁvatsaumya svasti gaṁgājala dhauta paramapavitrī ja
gadekamātā śrīmat somalamahādevi dvitīya dhāraṇa
mahādevī tasyā dharmaḥ kalaṁmba samipasyā bhūmi dattaṁ de
va nāmesvarasya Akareṇa sarvvavādhāparihareṇa paṁḍiātaṭṭā
katala mahāmaka debadāya samaṁkṛtā bhūmi devasya dattaṁ jasya
yasya jadā bhūmi tadā tasya tadā phalaṁ ṣaṣṭhiṁ variṣa sahasāṇi
svarge modaṁti bhūmidā mahānagahre ṭemarādhi dattaḥ sārinā
yaka dhāthī nāyaka pragiḍā kāmaṭhi monaṇarāṇā doṇṭayo
samasta dharmādhikaḥ visuvā korideva kāmeśvarasya dataḥ
grāmanāyakaḥ Aṭavaṇṇi mahāparivra paṁḍita soma sama
ṭṭamaṇa nāyaka gayādhara sādhumaidhara sādhu Āmadeva jiṇa
grāma sādhusomaṇa sidhudevu sādhu somā sādhu sahadeva siṁ
ghamahājana janojanita sukīnāyaka kānama Upari
maha yugidarapa Ekamaḥ nārāyaṇa pura vāsika bhami
gā sādhu vighna bhoi palavā bhoi seṭhi mahaṇḍa brahmandha
sādhu bhīmaḥ sargagakoṁ tasya suttaḥ dedu likhiṁtaṁ hisyāndi (?)
vā madhiṁkākṣara vā sarvva patipaṇṇamasu maṁgala mahā śrī
jo Anyathā karoti tasya pitā gardabhaḥ sukarimātā
Utkīritaṁ sūtradhārī dāmodara pajyaṁ racita tikama
Digital edition of SII 25.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
